output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?character ?characterLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q47500433 wdt:P161 ?actor .
  ?actor wdt:P1550 ?character .
  ?character wdt:P106 ?occupation .
  ?character rdfs:label ?characterLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?characterLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?characterLabel) , 'yennefer') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?characterLabel) , 'yennefer'))
}
